goal: Screenshot this page. Is there a clear visible active/selected state on the sidebar navigation item for the current page? Describe what you see on the active nav item (color, border, background). Rate the design /10.

action.criteria: Is there a clear visible active/selected state on the 'Blueprints' sidebar navigation item? Describe any visual indicators like background color, border, font weight, or accent colors that distinguish it from other nav items.

steps.expectedEffect: Evaluation will return detailed observations about the visual state of the Blueprints navigation item compared to other nav items like Dashboard, Operators, Rewards, and Earnings
